title: senecio neelgherryanus
intro: Senecio neelgherryanus, also known as the Neelgerry Groundsel, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to India. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and dyspepsia. The health benefits of Senecio neelgherryanus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce inflammation and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Senecio neelgherryanus is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
